title: ZT-3-TC-1: User can log in successfully with valid email

steps.expected: User can log in successfully with valid email and password.

expected_result: User can log in successfully with valid email and password.

title: ZT-3-TC-2: User sees an error message when credentials are

steps.expected: User sees an error message when credentials are invalid.

expected_result: User sees an error message when credentials are invalid.

title: ZT-3-TC-3: Login fails if fields are empty.

steps.expected: Login fails if fields are empty.

expected_result: Login fails if fields are empty.

title: ZT-3-TC-4: Login button stays disabled unless both fields are

steps.expected: Login button stays disabled unless both fields are filled.

expected_result: Login button stays disabled unless both fields are filled.
